valuation_policy: Heuristic relative value map. Not an investment appraisal. Scientific value increases only with raw data, checksum, uncertainty, and baselines.

safe_conclusion: The item value map shows where each seed has academic and application value. None of the items yet carries final scientific claim value because raw data, checksum, uncertainty, and baseline gates remain false.
